root_cause_summary: The contract request referenced a customer ID that did not belong to the intended customer.
root_cause_details: The customer_id in the contract creation payload did not resolve to the customer's active Metronome customer record.
resolution_summary: Replaced the customer_id with the correct customer record and retried the contract creation request.
resolution_steps: Looked up the customer record using the customer's known external identifier.
Compared the referenced customer_id with the active customer record.
Updated the contract payload to use the correct customer_id.
verification_steps: Verify the customer_id resolves to the intended customer.
Verify the corrected contract references the right customer.
verification_results: The corrected customer_id resolved to the intended customer.
The created contract was associated with the correct customer.
